checks.name: view_reservation_safety

checks.name: view_rates_safety
checks.description: viewRates only if user has at least viewer permissions AND (in-season OR admin)

checks.name: floor_viewer_viewReservation
checks.description: A user with viewer hotel permissions MUST be able to viewReservation

checks.name: floor_member_updateReservation
checks.description: A user with member hotel permissions MUST be able to updateReservation

checks.name: floor_admin_grantAccessReservation
checks.description: A user with hotel admin permissions MUST be able to grantAccessReservation

checks.name: floor_admin_viewRates_outOfSeason
checks.description: Admin users MUST be able to viewRates even outside the season window

checks.name: floor_viewer_viewRates_inSeason
checks.description: Viewer users MUST be able to viewRates when currentTime is within season window

checks.name: liveness_viewReservation
